metadata.notes: Times are source-relative from 00:00:00.000. Segment end_time is an exclusive cut boundary.

segments.title: Opening Hook
segments.hook: A strong opening moment introduces the main conflict.
segments.start_reason: The segment starts at the beginning of the source.
segments.end_reason: The segment ends on a question that motivates the next segment.

segments.title: Rising Pressure
segments.hook: The stakes become clearer as the central problem escalates.
segments.start_reason: The segment begins when the next major beat starts.
segments.end_reason: The segment ends on a reveal that creates momentum.

segments.title: Cliffhanger Turn
segments.hook: A final turn leaves the audience wanting the next episode.
segments.start_reason: The segment begins immediately after the reveal.
segments.end_reason: The segment ends on a clean cliffhanger boundary.
